framework.name: Australian Financial Services Compliance
framework.description: Integrated compliance framework for Australian financial services providers covering ASIC, APRA, and AUSTRAC obligations.

controls.title: AFS Licence Maintenance
controls.summary_description: Maintain current AFS licence conditions and notify ASIC of changes within required timeframes.
controls.implementation_guidance: Review licence conditions quarterly. Notify ASIC within 10 business days of material changes.

controls.title: Responsible Manager Competency
controls.summary_description: Ensure all responsible managers meet ASIC competency and experience requirements (RG 105).
controls.implementation_guidance: Maintain register of responsible managers with qualifications and experience records.

controls.title: Financial Product Disclosure
controls.summary_description: Maintain compliant Product Disclosure Statements (PDS) and Financial Services Guides (FSG).
controls.implementation_guidance: Review PDS and FSG documents annually and after material changes.

controls.title: Conflicts of Interest Management
controls.summary_description: Identify, manage, and disclose conflicts of interest in accordance with s912A(1)(aa).
controls.implementation_guidance: Maintain conflicts register and review quarterly.

controls.title: Best Interest Duty Compliance
controls.summary_description: Ensure financial advisers comply with best interest duty under Division 2 of Part 7.7A.
controls.implementation_guidance: Implement file review program and advice quality monitoring.

controls.title: Breach Reporting to ASIC
controls.summary_description: Report significant breaches to ASIC within required timeframes under s912D.
controls.implementation_guidance: Maintain breach register, assess significance within 30 days, report to ASIC if significant.

controls.title: Operational Risk Management
controls.summary_description: Maintain operational risk management framework in accordance with CPS 230.
controls.implementation_guidance: Identify, assess, and manage operational risks including material service providers.

controls.title: Business Continuity Planning
controls.summary_description: Maintain and test business continuity and disaster recovery plans per CPS 230.
controls.implementation_guidance: Test BCP annually. Update after material changes or incidents.

controls.title: Material Service Provider Management
controls.summary_description: Manage risks from material service providers including fourth-party dependencies.

controls.title: Information Security Management
controls.summary_description: Maintain information security controls per CPS 234.
controls.implementation_guidance: Implement security controls, incident response, and testing program.

controls.title: Governance and Accountability
controls.summary_description: Board and senior management governance obligations under CPS 510.
controls.implementation_guidance: Maintain fit and proper assessments for responsible persons.

controls.title: AML/CTF Program Maintenance
controls.summary_description: Maintain and update AML/CTF program including Part A (customer identification) and Part B (transaction monitoring).
controls.implementation_guidance: Review program annually and after material changes to business or typology updates.

controls.title: Customer Due Diligence
controls.summary_description: Verify customer identity before providing designated services (KYC/CDD).
controls.implementation_guidance: Implement risk-based CDD procedures for new and existing customers.

controls.title: Transaction Monitoring
controls.summary_description: Monitor transactions for suspicious activity and report SMRs/TTRs to AUSTRAC.
controls.implementation_guidance: Configure monitoring thresholds, review alerts, and lodge reports within required timeframes.

controls.title: AUSTRAC Compliance Reporting
controls.summary_description: Lodge compliance reports with AUSTRAC including TTRs, IFTIs, and SMRs.
controls.implementation_guidance: Ensure all reportable transactions are lodged within prescribed timeframes.

controls.title: AML/CTF Staff Training
controls.summary_description: Provide AML/CTF awareness training to all relevant employees.
controls.implementation_guidance: Deliver initial and ongoing training. Maintain training records.

controls.title: AFCA Membership Compliance
controls.summary_description: Maintain AFCA membership and comply with reporting and complaints handling requirements.
controls.implementation_guidance: Respond to AFCA complaints within required timeframes. Lodge annual compliance certificate.

controls.title: Internal Dispute Resolution
controls.summary_description: Maintain IDR procedures compliant with RG 271.
controls.implementation_guidance: Respond to complaints within 30 calendar days (or 21 for hardship, 5 for small business credit).

controls.title: Annual Compliance Certificate
controls.summary_description: Lodge annual compliance certificate with ASIC confirming compliance with licence conditions.
controls.implementation_guidance: Complete self-assessment and lodge by due date.

controls.title: Client Money Handling
controls.summary_description: Comply with client money handling obligations under Chapter 7.
controls.implementation_guidance: Maintain trust accounts, reconcile monthly, and ensure segregation of client funds.
